g.onclick: sendPrompt('Booking event triggers: booking.confirmed, appointment.reminder — how NotifyModule enqueues to email-queue and in-app-queue')
sendPrompt('Session event triggers: video session timeout job, session cleanup after ended/failed — how VideoModule enqueues to video-queue')
sendPrompt('OTP and alert triggers: patient login OTP via SMS, urgent clinical alert — how AuthModule and admin broadcast enqueue to sms-queue')
sendPrompt('email-queue: job payload shape, priority levels, delay for reminders (scheduleAt), deduplication key to prevent duplicate emails')
sendPrompt('sms-queue: job payload with phone number + template, OTP TTL, Twilio rate limit handling, retry on 429')
sendPrompt('in-app-queue: enqueue WS emit jobs, userId target, fallback to email if user offline, delivery receipt tracking')
sendPrompt('video-queue: timeout job (schedule 5min delay), cleanup job (delete temp files after 24h), failed session retry logic')
sendPrompt('EmailWorker: @Process(email-queue), job data shape, render Handlebars template, call SendGrid API, log to notification_logs')
sendPrompt('SmsWorker: call Twilio sendMessage(), handle rate limits, OTP expiry check before send, log delivery status')
sendPrompt('InAppWorker: check if user is connected (Redis ws:rooms), if online → WS emit, if offline → mark as unread in DB for next login')
sendPrompt('VideoWorker: handle session timeout (mark missed), session cleanup (delete temp recordings after TTL), retry failed ICE sessions')
sendPrompt('SendGrid email adapter: API key config, from address, dynamic template ID, error handling on 4xx/5xx')
sendPrompt('Twilio SMS adapter: accountSid + authToken, message template, Vietnamese phone format (+84), delivery webhook')
sendPrompt('WS push adapter: gateway.server.to(userId_room).emit(), store unread in notification_logs if offline, mark read on client ack')
sendPrompt('Video job handler: no external adapter needed — updates video_sessions.status in DB, deletes temp S3 objects, emits WS event to affected users')
